metadata.description: GTM Intelligence for Claude Code: a go-to-market consultant that orchestrates Jobs to Be Done, positioning, irresistible offers, lead generation, copy, content, SEO/GEO 2026, email automation and Instagram performance into a complete pipeline, with a router (gtm-buddy) that points you to the right skill or the right sequence for any situation.

plugins.name: bettercallclaudegrowth
plugins.description: GTM Intelligence -- Jobs to Be Done (Christensen), positioning (Butcher), irresistible offers and leads (Hormozi), copy (Drew's SUCKS), content (Doing Content Right), SEO/GEO 2026, email automation (AEMA) and Instagram performance, orchestrated into an adaptive go-to-market pipeline with a readiness score, adversarial review, and a gtm-buddy router that routes by business archetype.
